headlines: Circle launches cirBTC to bring Bitcoin into DeFi
Ethereum Foundation makes a big ETH staking move
Morgan Stanley signals a spot Bitcoin ETF is near launch
Moody’s rates New Hampshire’s $100M bitcoin-backed bond Ba2

Riot Platforms sold 3,778 BTC in Q1 to fund AI/data-center buildout','Binance to delist several perpetual contracts on April 8–9, 2026','Franklin Templeton buys 250 Digital to launch 'Franklin Crypto' unit','US jobs beat and big options expiry lift crypto volatility (Apr 3, 2026)

articles.title: Circle launches cirBTC to bring Bitcoin into DeFi
articles.summary: Circle (USDC issuer) unveiled cirBTC — a 1:1, on‑chain‑verifiable wrapped BTC token that will debut on Ethereum and Circle’s Arc chain to let institutions and DeFi users move BTC into lending, liquidity, and yield apps.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation stakes large chunk of ETH from its treasury
articles.summary: On April 3, on‑chain analytics showed the Ethereum Foundation deposited a major tranche of ETH into the Beacon deposit contract — roughly tens of millions of dollars worth in the largest single‑day stake so far — as the foundation shifts from selling to staking treasury ETH.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley signals its spot Bitcoin ETF is close
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley updated SEC registration filings and listing notices for a Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (ticker MSBT), a sign the bank’s spot Bitcoin ETF is moving toward launch and could increase competition among institutional ETF issuers.

articles.title: Moody’s gives New Hampshire’s $100M bitcoin‑backed bond a Ba2 rating
articles.summary: Moody’s assigned a provisional Ba2 rating to a proposed $100M Bitcoin‑collateralized municipal bond for New Hampshire’s Business Finance Authority — the first major credit‑rating step for a US bitcoin‑backed public‑finance deal.

articles.title: Riot Platforms sold 3,778 BTC in Q1 to fund AI and data‑center plans
articles.summary: Riot reported it sold 3,778 BTC in Q1 2026 for roughly $289.5M to raise cash for AI/HPC data center expansion, trimming its on‑balance bitcoin holdings as miners reallocate capital for infrastructure projects.

articles.title: Binance to delist several perpetual futures contracts (April 8–9, 2026)
articles.summary: Binance announced it will automatically close and then remove a set of USD‑M and COIN‑M perpetual contracts on April 8 and April 9, 2026 — traders should close positions before the scheduled settlements to avoid forced liquidations.
articles.source: ChainCatcher / AiCoin reporting on Binance notice

articles.title: Franklin Templeton to acquire 250 Digital and launch Franklin Crypto
articles.summary: Franklin Templeton agreed to buy crypto trading firm 250 Digital to create a dedicated institutional crypto unit called Franklin Crypto, marking another major asset manager building active crypto investment capabilities.

articles.title: US jobs beat + large BTC/ETH options expiry raise crypto volatility (Apr 3, 2026)
articles.summary: The April 3 US March nonfarm payrolls beat expectations and coincided with a large BTC and ETH options expiry; markets saw immediate price moves and higher short‑term volatility as traders priced macro and derivatives flows.
